name: Onix Pure 2 Indoor Pickleballs
description: The Onix Pure 2 is engineered specifically for indoor play, featuring 26 precisely spaced holes for a softer, more controlled flight on gym and rec center surfaces. The true-flight design minimizes wobble and provides consistent bounce on smooth indoor courts.
care_instructions: Indoor balls last longer than outdoor balls. Store at room temperature. Clean with a damp cloth if they pick up dust or gym floor residue.
